rules.Dakka: Each unmodified roll of a 6 To Hit causes one additional Auto Hit. 'Ere We Go! - This model may reroll failed Charge rolls.
rules.Mob Rule: 12" True Aura, friendly units may treat their Ld equal to the number of models in this unit.
rules.Poor Maintenance: In each of your Command Phases, roll a d6 for each unit with this rule in your army. On a 1, the unit must decide if it will Move or Shoot this turn. If elected to Move, it may Advance and Fall Back this turn but cannot Shoot or Charge. If elected to Shoot, it may Shoot in the Shooting Phase, but cannot Move, Advance, Charge, or Fall Back. High Altitude models MUST always move, and can never opt to Shoot instead of Move because of Poor Maintenance.

rules.Fuel Mixa Grot: One Use Only. This model Advances 6 instead of rolling d6. Declare

rules.Stikkbomb Flinga: This model gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save vs Ranged Attacks.
rules.Targeting Squig: This model may reroll To Hit with ranged weapons.

rules.Speed Freeks: All Vehicles gain M+2. Aircraft may turn 90 degrees after firing in the Wazdakka Gutsmek The Bike of the Aporkalypse Big Revva
rules.Speed Freek: All Vehicles gain M+2. Aircraft may turn 90 degrees after firing in the Wazdakka Gutsmek The Bike of the Aporkalypse Big Revva
rules.Orknapped!: If this weapon successfully Wounds (after Saves and Feel No Pains) while in a Challenge with an Infantry or Monstrous Infantry model, this model may leave Combat on its next Movement Phase and take its Challenger with it! The Challenge still
rules.Breakin' 'Eads!: 6" Aura, the first time each phase a friendly Ork unit fails a Ld test, this model inflicts d3 Mortal Wounds to that unit and it automatically passes that test.
rules.Fixit da Grot: This model Heals 1 Wound in each of its Command Phases.
rules.Waaagh!: 6" Aura, this model and target unit score one Auto Hit on a unmodified roll of a 6 To Hit in Melee. Warlord Titan Crew Skulls - 6" Aura, target unit must take a Fear Test at Ld-1.

wargear.'Ard Case: This model loses Open Topped and its Firing Ports.
wargear.Extra Armour: This model may treat Crew Stuns as Weapon Disables instead. Choose as soon as you receive a Crew Stun result.
wargear.Forcefield: This model gains a+ Invulnerability Save.
wargear.Fuel Mixa Grot: One Use Only. This model Advances 6 instead of rolling d6. Declare before choosing to roll for Advance distance.
wargear.Grot Oiler: One Use Only. This model may reroll the Repair Die (either to restore service or number of wounds restored).
wargear.Stikkbomb Flinga: This model gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save vs Ranged Attacks.
wargear.Targeting Squig: This model may reroll To Hit with ranged weapons.
wargear.Turbo Charga: You may declare an Advance in the Movement Phase instead of the Shooting Phase when nominating this model to Move. If you roll a 1 this model suffers 1 Mortal Wound and cannot Move, Advance, Charge, or Fall Back until your next Movement Phase. You do not count as having Advanced this Turn (meaning you can still Advance in the Shooting Phase).

rules.name: Hyper ADHD Gitz
rules.description: Infantry models in your army only count as half a model for purposes of contesting an Objective Marker.

rules.name: Speed Freeks
rules.description: All Vehicles gain M+2. Aircraft may turn 90 degrees after firing in the Shooting Phase as well as before moving in the Movement Phase.

hq.name: Wazdakka Gutsmek
hq.composition: 0-1 The Bike of the Aporkalypse 0-1 Big Revva

options.description: May trade The Bike of the Aporkalypse for Big Revva for +0 points
